final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a pearl milk tea product targeting Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) social media.

Style/medium: clean lifestyle product photography, soft editorial aesthetic with influencer-friendly composition
Composition: flat-lay overhead shot, centered product placement with generous negative space, mobile-friendly vertical framing
Subject: iced pearl milk tea in a clear cup with visible tapioca pearls, condensation droplets on cup surface, pastel pink straw
Scene/backdrop: minimalist marble or light wood surface, soft pink fabric accents, scattered ice cubes, subtle summer props
Lighting/mood: bright natural daylight from side window, soft shadows, airy and refreshing summer vibe
Color palette: dominant soft pink as base, warm milk tea beige as anchor, white highlights, subtle cool blue from ice
Materials/textures: glossy plastic cup with condensation, chewy dark tapioca pearls, frothy milk tea surface, soft fabric drape
Avoid: cluttered background, harsh artificial lighting, oversaturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermarks
